text: When you are giving mouth-to-nose AR, you should:

options.text: Pinch the nostrils closed before blowing air into the casualty.
Tilt the head back less than for the mouth-to-mouth method of AR.
Keep the mouth and nose closed betweenbreaths.

explanation: When performing mouth-to-nose resuscitation, it is essential to hold the casualty's mouth closed to ensure that the air forced through the nostrils enters the lungs rather than escaping through the mouth.
